column1: He _____ already _____ . He is in the hall now. (come)
School year usually _____ on the first of September. (begin)
Last year school year _____ on the second of September. (begin)
School year _____ already _____ . We can't go to the seaside now. (begin)
I think tomorrow we _____ our lesson at 7.30. (begin)
I'm afraid. You see, I _____ never _____ to the seaside before! (be)
The English Channel _____ England from France. The French _____ it La Manche. (separate, call)
Dinosaurs _____ eggs, just as today's reptiles do. (lay)
Are you busy? - Yes, we are. Alla _____ the floor, I _____ the T-shirts. (sweep, iron)
